filename: The Good Practice - Cases for Dr Justin Hammond.xlsx
summary: This Excel file acts as a metadata index for pilot cases managed by Dr Justin Hammond under 'The Good Practice' initiative. It lists five specific call IDs, associated medical symptoms, and external links to stored transcripts and summaries hosted on Firebase and Google Drive. The document does not contain the actual conversation text but serves as a tracking log for the pilot program's scope.
